data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. ASCEND KALMIA comes off a (21.90) win last time, scoring by 1.3 lengths in a Grade 5 over 380m at this track. Has already won two times from this draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat. 6. FEDERAL ARLO comes here off a placing in swift time (21.93) over 380m at this track. Harder here but expected to feature again. 1. MAD ATTITUDE doesn't win out of turn. Finished in the minors latest when second (22.35) at this track and may be close to breaking through. Winning chance. 8. HIGH GEAR MARIA can return to form after missing the top-three at this circuit last time out.","runners":[2,6,1,8],"exclusive":false}
